generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and security, I worry about the growing burden on our allies. While alliances are important, we can't ignore the strain on our own resources. It's time to have a serious discussion about how we balance our commitments without compromising our own national security. #StrongerAtHome #AllianceReform
